title: Savory German Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful German-inspired stir fry packed with savory goodness, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat savory oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion leaves and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add Russian potatoes and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Add crunchy bacon and cook until crispy, breaking into pieces as it cooks.
Sprinkle savory stir-fry seasoning over the top and stir to combine.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional onion leaves if desired.
Optional: Serve with fry sauce on the side for dipping.
